title: Barrett's Esophagus
subtitle: Understanding Barrett's esophagus and your surveillance plan
description: Clear, evidence-based information about Barrett's esophagus — what it means, your actual cancer risk, surveillance schedules, and treatment options. Created by a Canadian gastroenterologist.
